title: Noah Pearl
text:
Statistics and data science undergrad at UC Santa Barbara, headed toward biostatistics research. I like the theory and I like building things that use it to help real people.
Right now I’m doing biostatistics research through ISI-BUDS at UC Irvine, working primarily in R for public health. Notes and projects are in the nav above.

title: About
text: I’m a third-year statistics and data science student at UC Santa Barbara, aiming at a meaningful career in biostatistics.

title: About
text:
What I work on
My coursework has run through the probability and stochastic processes sequence, regression and GLMs, and statistical machine learning. Right now I’m doing some personal study into epidemiology and strengthening my R skills.
This summer I’m part of ISI-BUDS, an NIH-funded biostatistics research program at UC Irvine, learning by working on real questions alongside faculty and grad students.

title: About
text:
Elsewhere
Big fan of Padres baseball, general NBA, working out, and modern jazz :)
You can reach me at noahpearl@ucsb.edu, or grab my CV.
